raw_consumer_statement:
I booked and paid in advance for accommodation at XXXX on XXXX XXXX and XXXX, a XXXX hotel located at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Upon arrival, I was not offered any room at XXXX on XXXX XXXX and XXXX. I was instead directed to a different property at a different address. 

The property I was sent to was XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX, a wedding venue. This a different property, with a different name, at different address, a different business category ( wedding venue ), and with its own separate XXXX XXXX listing and rating ( a lower rating ). 

This was clear and apparent fraud under US and XXXX law. I did receive any services. The charge is therefore invalid.
